summary.en: Friedrichshain embodies East Berlin's alternative spirit, famous for its vibrant nightlife, extensive street art, and independent shops, especially around Boxhagener Platz.
Kreuzberg is Berlin's historic heart of counter-culture, bursting with street art, diverse communities, independent shops, and buzzing nightlife.
The historic heart of Berlin, specifically the Scheunenviertel and Auguststraße areas, blending upscale boutiques and art galleries with significant historical landmarks and vibrant street life.

name.zh-Hans: 米特区（谷仓区和奥古斯特街）
name.zh-Hant: 米特區（穀倉區和奧古斯特街）

summary.en: This historic district, once the Jewish Quarter, offers a refined blend of art galleries, designer boutiques, charming courtyards, and sophisticated dining.

name.zh-Hans: 米特 (谷仓区/施潘道尔前城)
name.zh-Hant: 米特 (穀倉區/施潘道爾前城)

summary.en: Neukölln blends bohemian grit with a vibrant international scene, known for its creative energy, independent bars, and diverse culinary offerings.
Prenzlauer Berg is known for its beautifully restored 'Altbau' architecture, leafy streets, chic boutiques, and family-friendly atmosphere, blending its bohemian past with modern sophistication.
A sophisticated and relaxed district, particularly the charming Akazienkiez, known for its beautiful Wilhelminian-era buildings, independent shops, cozy cafes, and historical LGBTQ+ significance.

Schöneberg's Akazienkiez and Winterfeldtplatz area offers a classic Berlin feel with elegant architecture, a famous weekly market, and a strong sense of local community, including its rich LGBTQ+ history.

name.zh-Hans: 舍讷贝格 (金合欢区/温特费尔德广场)
name.zh-Hant: 舍訥貝格 (金合歡區/溫特費爾德廣場)

description.en: A bustling public square hosting a popular Sunday flea market and a weekly food market on Saturdays, surrounded by cafes and shops.
A local favorite serving gourmet burgers with fresh ingredients and creative combinations in a casual, urban setting.
A cozy and intimate bar known for its unique cocktails, quirky decor, and candlelight atmosphere, perfect for a relaxed evening.
A brutalist former church impressively repurposed into a contemporary art gallery, hosting avant-garde exhibitions.

name.zh-Hans: 国王画廊 (圣阿格尼斯教堂)
name.zh-Hant: 國王畫廊 (聖阿格尼斯教堂)

description.en: An iconic double-deck bridge connecting Friedrichshain and Kreuzberg, known for its distinctive architecture and historical significance.
A unique tribute to the legendary punk band Ramones, combining a museum with a lively bar, showcasing memorabilia and hosting events.
A former train repair yard turned alternative cultural complex, featuring clubs, art spaces, a climbing wall, and extensive street art.
A popular spot near the East Side Gallery known for its authentic and delicious Wiener Schnitzel, serving up traditional Austrian comfort food.
Located in a former public toilet beneath the U-Bahn tracks, this iconic spot serves some of Berlin's best and most beloved burgers.
The longest open-air gallery in the world, a section of the Berlin Wall painted with murals by artists from around the world.
A renowned specialty coffee roastery and cake shop, famous for its cheesecake and ethically sourced beans in a cozy setting.

name.zh-Hans: 五象咖啡烘焙店与蛋糕店
name.zh-Hant: 五象咖啡烘焙店與蛋糕店
name.en: Five Elephant Coffee Roastery & Cake Shop

description.en: A charming residential area around Graefestraße, known for its beautiful altbau buildings, independent boutiques, and quiet cafes, reflecting Kreuzberg's calmer side.
A popular and laid-back bar on Oranienstraße, known for its eclectic crowd, good music, and casual atmosphere, perfect for people-watching.
A historic market hall hosting a vibrant street food market on Thursdays, and a hub for local producers and artisanal foods.
Berlin's most famous and often-queued-for döner kebab stand, serving delicious grilled vegetables and chicken in a unique blend of spices.
A beautiful park with a waterfall and the highest natural point in inner-city Berlin, offering panoramic views of the city.

name.zh-Hans: 维多利亚公园 / 克罗伊茨贝格山
name.zh-Hant: 維多利亞公園 / 克羅伊茨貝格山

description.en: A sophisticated cocktail bar housed in a former pharmacy, known for its creative drinks served in a unique, historic setting.
These streets are known as Berlin's gallery mile, featuring numerous contemporary art galleries in former industrial spaces.

name.zh-Hans: 奥古斯特大街 / 线形大街艺术画廊
name.zh-Hant: 奧古斯特大街 / 線形大街藝術畫廊

description.en: A popular specialty coffee shop in Mitte, renowned for its excellent brews, delicious brunch options, and stylish industrial-chic interior.
A trendy Asian-fusion restaurant specializing in fresh sushi, Vietnamese dishes, and a vibrant atmosphere, often packed with a stylish crowd.
A complex of beautifully restored Art Nouveau courtyards housing independent boutiques, cafes, galleries, and a cinema.
A green oasis along the Spree River, perfect for relaxing with views of Museum Island, and home to a popular outdoor swing dancing spot in summer.
An impressive and historically significant synagogue with a golden dome, now a museum and cultural center, symbolizing Jewish life in Berlin.
Berlin's oldest restaurant, serving traditional German cuisine since 1621 in a rustic, historic setting favored by figures like Napoleon and Beethoven.
A classic, no-frills Neukölln bar with a smoky, lived-in atmosphere, affordable drinks, and a genuine local crowd.
A popular, no-frills spot serving delicious and hearty vegan and vegetarian burritos, a favorite among locals.
A celebrated pizzeria known for its authentic Neapolitan-style pizzas, using high-quality ingredients and a traditional wood-fired oven.
A vibrant rooftop bar and cultural space perched atop a shopping mall parking garage, offering stunning panoramic views of Berlin.
A bustling street market along the Landwehrkanal, famous for its vibrant Turkish and international produce, fabrics, and street food on Tuesdays and Fridays.

name.zh-Hans: 迈巴赫河岸市场 (土耳其市场)
name.zh-Hant: 邁巴赫河岸市場 (土耳其市場)

description.en: The historic heart of Rixdorf (now Neukölln), featuring a charming village square with traditional half-timbered houses and a serene atmosphere.
The former Tempelhof Airport, now a massive urban park where locals cycle, skate, BBQ, and relax on its vast runways and open spaces.
A central artery of Neukölln's nightlife and cultural scene, lined with independent bars, cafes, art spaces, and vintage shops.
A pioneer in Berlin's specialty coffee scene, known for its high-quality, ethically sourced beans and minimalist, design-focused cafe.
A charming square known for its weekly organic market, elegant architecture, and relaxed cafes, named after artist Käthe Kollwitz.
An iconic East Berlin institution, serving legendary Currywurst since 1930, a must-try for traditional German fast food.
A sprawling former brewery complex transformed into a cultural hub, hosting cinemas, theaters, restaurants, and event spaces.
Famous for its Sunday flea market, open-air karaoke, and vast green spaces – a vibrant meeting point for locals and tourists.
Berlin's oldest beer garden, offering a relaxed outdoor setting under chestnut trees to enjoy traditional German beers and food.
A popular Vietnamese fusion restaurant with a stylish ambiance, serving innovative dishes that blend traditional flavors with modern twists.
Berlin's oldest water tower, a striking brick landmark offering historical insight and panoramic views from its surrounding park.
Charming streets filled with independent boutiques, local designers, bookstores, and cafes, offering a relaxed shopping experience.

name.zh-Hans: 金合欢大街 / 贝尔齐格大街精品店
name.zh-Hant: 金合歡大街 / 貝爾齊格大街精品店

description.en: A charming and spacious cafe designed like a classic library, offering a cozy atmosphere, delicious cakes, and a wide selection of books.
A modern German eatery and butcher shop, focusing on high-quality, locally sourced meats and contemporary takes on traditional dishes.
An imposing historic gasometer, a monumental industrial landmark now being redeveloped, symbolizing Berlin's blend of old and new.
Highly-rated Neapolitan pizzeria known for its authentic flavors, fresh ingredients, and vibrant, bustling atmosphere.
A historic square and the heart of Berlin's LGBTQ+ community since the early 20th century, surrounded by gay bars, cafes, and community centers.
A hidden speakeasy-style cocktail bar with a dark, atmospheric interior and expertly crafted drinks, inspired by classic American blues.
Berlin's largest weekly outdoor market, bustling with fresh produce, artisanal goods, flowers, and international food stalls on Wednesdays and Saturdays.
A unique cultural experience offering a slice of Central Asia in the middle of Berlin, known as the Tadschikische Teestube to locals.
A whimsical and twisted cellar tour featuring animatronic monsters and strange creatures, located beneath the streets near Hackesche Höfe.
A reliable and classic bar on a corner of two of Mitte's prettiest streets, serving the neighborhood since just after the fall of the Wall.
A popular Japanese restaurant in Mitte that serves top-quality sushi, donburis, and more at surprisingly reasonable prices.
A futuristic spa where you can float in a pool of warm salt water while listening to underwater techno music.
A quintessential Berlin bar with bare concrete walls, a blue-lit bar, and clouds of cigarette smoke, overlooking Kottbusser Tor.
A 100-year-old pub serving a famously simple and traditional German meal of fried chicken, potato salad, and cabbage.
Arguably the best bar in a neighborhood known for them, this large corner spot is hidden away on a quiet backstreet.
An Italian restaurant with a massive urban garden where you can sit and eat surrounded by the blooming vegetables used in your meal.
A unique Italian restaurant set inside a beautifully converted old laundromat, offering a memorable dining experience.
Located in the Kollwitzkiez area, this restaurant serves exceptional modern Sri Lankan comfort food.
Serving authentic Argentinian empanadas with perfect dough and flavorful fillings, this spot is a local favorite for a delicious snack.
A sophisticated and grown-up drinking spot in Schöneberg, known for its classic cocktails and elegant atmosphere.
An authentic butcher shop serving hearty, classic German meals at unbeatable prices, a true hidden gem for local-approved food.
A quintessential Kreuzberg dive bar where the night never truly ends, embodying the city's famous, gritty nightlife.
A welcoming, women-owned FLINTA cocktail bar in Kreuzberg, offering a safe and inclusive space for a great drink.
A unique Kreuzberg restaurant focusing on creative dishes made with interesting foraged and fermented ingredients.
Germany's most visited museum, home to monumental structures like the Pergamon Altar and the Ishtar Gate from Babylon.
A surreal and fascinating museum in Mitte showcasing a bizarre collection of extraordinary industrial objects and inventions.
A Neukölln favorite winning the fierce kebab competition with high-quality ingredients, fresh bread, and complimentary tea.
A serene listening bar in Neukölln offering a welcome change of pace from the city's smoky dives, focusing on high-fidelity sound.
A relaxed and stylish natural wine bar on Neukölln's lively Pannierstraße, perfect for kicking off a weekend evening.
Named one of Germany's best bars, this Neukölln spot offers a sophisticated and innovative cocktail experience on the bustling Weserstraße.
Explore Berlin's hidden history with tours through WWII air-raid shelters, Cold War bunkers, and escape tunnels.
A high-end Japanese restaurant in Prenzlauer Berg where you can watch sushi masters expertly prepare nigiri and slice premium fish.
A top-notch ice cream parlor in Schöneberg mastering creative and delicious flavors like black sesame and Earl Grey.
A unique and restful café located within a historic cemetery, offering a peaceful spot for coffee and cake.

prompt.zh-Hans: 捕捉一幅充满活力的街头艺术作品或涂鸦壁画，体现克罗伊茨贝格的艺术和反叛精神。
prompt.zh-Hant: 捕捉一幅充滿活力的街頭藝術作品或塗鴉壁畫，體現克羅伊茨貝格的藝術和反叛精神。
prompt.en: Capture a vibrant piece of street art or a graffiti mural that embodies Kreuzberg's artistic and rebellious spirit.

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄一张反映科特布斯门周围日常生活的场景——也许是一个有趣的人物、一个熙熙攘攘的市场摊位，或独特的建筑。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝一張反映科特布斯門周圍日常生活的場景——也許是一個有趣的人物、一個熙熙攘攘的市場攤位，或獨特的建築。
prompt.en: Photograph a scene reflecting daily life around Kottbusser Tor – perhaps an interesting character, a bustling market stall, or the unique architecture.

prompt.zh-Hans: 在克罗伊茨贝格的城市中心找到一个意想不到的小型绿色空间或社区花园。
prompt.zh-Hant: 在克羅伊茨貝格的城市中心找到一個意想不到的小型綠色空間或社區花園。
prompt.en: Find a small, unexpected green space or community garden in the middle of urban Kreuzberg.

prompt.zh-Hans: 在新克尔恩不那么精致的巷道中，寻找并拍摄一些隐藏的街头艺术或涂鸦。
prompt.zh-Hant: 在新克爾恩不那麼精緻的巷道中，尋找並拍攝一些隱藏的街頭藝術或塗鴉。
prompt.en: Find and photograph some hidden street art or graffiti in a less polished Neukölln alleyway.

prompt.zh-Hans: 在新克尔恩的商店橱窗里发现一件独特的复古服装或古董。
prompt.zh-Hant: 在新克爾恩的商店櫥窗裡發現一件獨特的復古服裝或古董。
prompt.en: Spot a unique vintage clothing item or antique in a Neukölln shop window.

prompt.zh-Hans: 寻找并拍摄一位为新克尔恩音景增添色彩的街头音乐家。
prompt.zh-Hant: 尋找並拍攝一位為新克爾恩音景增添色彩的街頭音樂家。
prompt.en: Find and photograph a street musician adding to the Neukölln soundscape.

prompt.zh-Hans: 在兰德维尔运河沿岸找一个地方，拍摄运河上建筑或树木倒影的照片。
prompt.zh-Hant: 在蘭德維爾運河沿岸找一個地方，拍攝運河上建築或樹木倒影的照片。
prompt.en: Find a spot along the Landwehrkanal and take a photo of the canal with reflections of buildings or trees on its surface.

prompt.zh-Hans: 在新克尔恩的建筑之间发现并拍摄一个安静、隐藏的庭院。
prompt.zh-Hant: 在新克爾恩的建築之間發現並拍攝一個安靜、隱藏的庭院。
prompt.en: Discover and photograph a quiet, hidden courtyard between Neukölln's buildings.

prompt.zh-Hans: 捕捉一家独立新克尔恩咖啡馆独特而奇特的室内设计。
prompt.zh-Hant: 捕捉一家獨立新克爾恩咖啡館獨特而奇特的室內設計。
prompt.en: Capture the unique and quirky interior design of an independent Neukölln cafe.

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄停泊在新克尔恩兰德维尔运河沿岸的一艘色彩斑斓的船屋或驳船。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝停泊在新克爾恩蘭德維爾運河沿岸的一艘色彩斑斕的船屋或駁船。
prompt.en: Photograph a colorful house-boat or barge moored along the Landwehrkanal in Neukölln.

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄一张新克尔恩酒吧夜晚霓虹灯或氛围灯光的照片。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝一張新克爾恩酒吧夜晚霓虹燈或氛圍燈光的照片。
prompt.en: Take a photo capturing the glow of neon signs or atmospheric lighting from a Neukölln bar at night.

prompt.zh-Hans: 捕捉普伦茨劳贝格一栋修复精美的“老建筑”立面的优雅细节。
prompt.zh-Hant: 捕捉普倫茨勞貝格一棟修復精美的“老建築”立面的優雅細節。
prompt.en: Capture the elegant details of a beautifully restored 'Altbau' (old building) facade in Prenzlauer Berg.

prompt.zh-Hans: 在普伦茨劳贝格找一家具有独特波西米亚或艺术气息的独立咖啡馆。
prompt.zh-Hant: 在普倫茨勞貝格找一家具有獨特波希米亞或藝術氣息的獨立咖啡館。
prompt.en: Find a cozy, independent cafe with a distinct bohemian or artistic flair in Prenzlauer Berg.

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄普伦茨劳贝格一条典型的绿树成荫的街道，最好能有一些有趣的自行车或当地生活。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝普倫茨勞貝格一條典型的綠樹成蔭的街道，最好能有一些有趣的自行車或當地生活。
prompt.en: Capture a typical tree-lined street in Prenzlauer Berg, ideally with some interesting bikes or local life.

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄普伦茨劳贝格众多美丽的游乐场（Spielplatz）中玩耍的孩子们。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝普倫茨勞貝格眾多美麗的遊樂場（Spielplatz）中玩耍的孩子們。
prompt.en: Photograph children playing in one of Prenzlauer Berg's many lovely playgrounds (Spielplatz).

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄普伦茨劳贝格一家独立精品店橱窗中精心布置的陈列。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝普倫茨勞貝格一家獨立精品店櫥窗中精心佈置的陳列。
prompt.en: Capture an artfully arranged display in the window of an independent Prenzlauer Berg boutique.

prompt.zh-Hans: 寻找一件较小、更微妙的街头艺术作品或贴纸，暗示普伦茨劳贝格的创意一面。
prompt.zh-Hant: 尋找一件較小、更微妙的街頭藝術作品或貼紙，暗示普倫茨勞貝格的創意一面。
prompt.en: Find a smaller, more subtle piece of street art or a sticker that hints at Prenzlauer Berg's creative side.

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄一栋典型的东柏林“板式建筑”（预制板建筑）。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝一棟典型的東柏林“板式建築”（預製板建築）。
prompt.en: Photograph a classic 'Plattenbau' (prefabricated panel building) structure that is typical of East Berlin architecture.

prompt.zh-Hans: 聚焦于一栋历史悠久的“老建筑”的建筑细节（例如，一扇特定的门、窗户或阳台）。
prompt.zh-Hant: 聚焦於一棟歷史悠久的“老建築”的建築細節（例如，一扇特定的門、窗戶或陽台）。
prompt.en: Focus on a detailed architectural element of a historic 'Altbau' building (e.g., a specific door, window, or balcony).

prompt.zh-Hans: 发现有人展示符合弗里德里希斯海因氛围的独特另类时尚。
prompt.zh-Hant: 發現有人展示符合弗里德里希斯海因氛圍的獨特另類時尚。
prompt.en: Spot someone showcasing distinctive, alternative fashion that fits the Friedrichshain vibe.

prompt.zh-Hans: 在弗里德里希斯海因找到并拍摄一家独立唱片店的店面。
prompt.zh-Hant: 在弗里德里希斯海因找到並拍攝一家獨立唱片店的店面。
prompt.en: Find and photograph the storefront of an independent record store in Friedrichshain.

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄一个典型的柏林“Späti”（深夜便利店），展示其独特的商品或店外的一群朋友。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝一個典型的柏林“Späti”（深夜便利店），展示其獨特的商品或店外的一群朋友。
prompt.en: Photograph a typical Berlin 'Späti' (late-night convenience store), showing its unique offerings or a group of friends outside.

prompt.zh-Hans: 找到一面贴满柏林传奇 techno 俱乐部或地下活动海报的墙。
prompt.zh-Hant: 找到一面貼滿柏林傳奇 techno 俱樂部或地下活動海報的牆。
prompt.en: Find a wall covered with posters for Berlin's legendary techno clubs or underground events.

prompt.zh-Hans: 捕捉西蒙达赫大街周围繁忙的夜晚街头生活，以其酒吧和餐馆而闻名。
prompt.zh-Hant: 捕捉西蒙達赫大街周圍繁忙的夜晚街頭生活，以其酒吧和餐館而聞名。
prompt.en: Capture the bustling evening street life around Simon-Dach-Straße, famous for its bars and restaurants.

prompt.zh-Hans: 寻找一件有趣的城市废弃物或被创造性地重新利用或装饰的废弃物品。
prompt.zh-Hant: 尋找一件有趣的城市廢棄物或被創造性地重新利用或裝飾的廢棄物品。
prompt.en: Find an interesting piece of urban decay or an abandoned object that has been creatively repurposed or decorated.

prompt.zh-Hans: 从弗里德里希斯海因一侧拍摄施普雷河上的日落，最好带有倒影。
prompt.zh-Hant: 從弗里德里希斯海因一側拍攝施普雷河上的日落，最好帶有倒影。
prompt.en: Capture the sunset over the Spree River from the Friedrichshain side, ideally with a reflection.

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍一张独特或新奇的店面招牌，它必须是独立本地经营的。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍一張獨特或新奇的店面招牌，它必須是獨立本地經營的。
prompt.en: Snap a picture of a quirky or unique shopfront sign that's clearly from an independent, locally-owned business.

prompt.zh-Hans: 在米特区寻找一家独立时尚或设计精品店的别致而时尚的橱窗展示。
prompt.zh-Hant: 在米特區尋找一家獨立時尚或設計精品店的別緻而時尚的櫥窗展示。
prompt.en: Find a chic and stylish window display from an independent fashion or design boutique in Mitte.

prompt.zh-Hans: 在庭院或不那么显眼的街道上发现一个微妙或隐藏的艺术装置或雕塑。
prompt.zh-Hant: 在庭院或不那麼顯眼的街道上發現一個微妙或隱藏的藝術裝置或雕塑。
prompt.en: Discover a subtle or tucked-away art installation or sculpture in a courtyard or less obvious street.

prompt.zh-Hans: 从街上，拍摄一张格罗斯汉堡大街上“老犹太公墓”的庄严照片，暗示其历史。
prompt.zh-Hant: 從街上，拍攝一張格羅斯漢堡大街上“老猶太公墓”的莊嚴照片，暗示其歷史。
prompt.en: From the street, get a respectful photo of the 'Alter Jüdischer Friedhof' on Große Hamburger Straße, hinting at its history.

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄一位为哈克雪市场周围文化氛围增添色彩的街头艺人或音乐家。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝一位為哈克雪市場周圍文化氛圍增添色彩的街頭藝人或音樂家。
prompt.en: Capture a street performer or musician adding to the cultural ambiance around Hackescher Markt.

prompt.zh-Hans: 聚焦于米特区建筑上的一个精致建筑细节（例如，一个石像鬼、一块历史铭牌、一扇华丽的窗户）。
prompt.zh-Hant: 聚焦於米特區建築上的一個精緻建築細節（例如，一個石像鬼、一塊歷史銘牌、一扇華麗的窗戶）。
prompt.en: Focus on an intricate architectural detail (e.g., a gargoyle, a historical plaque, an ornate window) from a Mitte building.

prompt.zh-Hans: 探索罗森塔勒大街，拍摄其众多小巷或隐藏的商店/画廊之一。
prompt.zh-Hant: 探索羅森塔勒大街，拍攝其眾多小巷或隱藏的商店/畫廊之一。
prompt.en: Explore Rosenthaler Straße and photograph one of its many small passages or hidden shops/galleries.

title.zh-Hans: 罗森塔勒大街隐藏瑰宝
title.zh-Hant: 羅森塔勒大街隱藏瑰寶

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄金合欢大街或贝尔齐格大街上一家独立精品店的诱人店面。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝金合歡大街或貝爾齊格大街上一家獨立精品店的誘人店面。
prompt.en: Photograph the inviting storefront of an independent boutique on Akazienstraße or Belziger Straße.

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄舍讷贝格一条以宏伟、优雅的老建筑和绿树成荫的人行道为特色的街道。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝舍訥貝格一條以宏偉、優雅的老建築和綠樹成蔭的人行道為特色的街道。
prompt.en: Photograph a street in Schöneberg featuring grand, elegant Altbau buildings and tree-lined sidewalks.

prompt.zh-Hans: 捕捉当地人在舍讷贝格较小而迷人的公园（例如，海因里希·冯·克莱斯特公园）中放松、阅读或玩耍的场景。
prompt.zh-Hant: 捕捉當地人在舍訥貝格較小而迷人的公園（例如，海因里希·馮·克萊斯特公園）中放鬆、閱讀或玩耍的場景。
prompt.en: Capture locals relaxing, reading, or playing in one of Schöneberg's smaller, charming parks (e.g., Heinrich-von-Kleist-Park).

prompt.zh-Hans: 在金合欢区寻找并拍摄一家独立书店的迷人立面。
prompt.zh-Hant: 在金合歡區尋找並拍攝一家獨立書店的迷人立面。
prompt.en: Find and photograph the inviting facade of an independent bookshop in the Akazienkiez.

prompt.zh-Hans: 虽然不像克罗伊茨贝格那样普遍，但在舍讷贝格寻找一幅独特的街头艺术或壁画。
prompt.zh-Hant: 雖然不像克羅伊茨貝格那樣普遍，但在舍訥貝格尋找一幅獨特的街頭藝術或壁畫。
prompt.en: While less prevalent than Kreuzberg, find a unique piece of street art or a mural in Schöneberg.

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄一张安佩尔曼交通灯的照片，这是东柏林的怀旧象征，偶尔可在舍讷贝格找到。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝一張安佩爾曼交通燈的照片，這是東柏林的懷舊象徵，偶爾可在舍訥貝格找到。
prompt.en: Capture a photo of an Ampelmann traffic light, a nostalgic symbol of East Berlin, found occasionally in Schöneberg.

prompt.zh-Hans: 在温特费尔德广场或附近寻找一个布置精美的花摊，突出其色彩和新鲜度。
prompt.zh-Hant: 在溫特費爾德廣場或附近尋找一個佈置精美的花攤，突出其色彩和新鮮度。
prompt.en: Find a beautifully arranged flower stand at or near Winterfeldtplatz, highlighting its colors and freshness.

prompt.zh-Hans: 捕捉舍讷贝格一座老建筑上一个华丽的建筑细节（例如，灰泥立面、一扇特别的窗户、一个装饰性入口）。
prompt.zh-Hant: 捕捉舍訥貝格一座老建築上一個華麗的建築細節（例如，灰泥立面、一扇特別的窗戶、一個裝飾性入口）。
prompt.en: Capture an ornate architectural detail (e.g., a stucco facade, a particular window, a decorated entrance) from an older Schöneberg building.

prompt.zh-Hans: 拍摄一座横跨兰德维尔运河的迷人桥梁，重点关注其建筑或其提供的景色。
prompt.zh-Hant: 拍攝一座橫跨蘭德維爾運河的迷人橋樑，重點關注其建築或其提供的景色。
prompt.en: Photograph one of the charming bridges crossing the Landwehrkanal, focusing on its architecture or the view it offers.
Many buildings in Mitte hide beautiful courtyards (Höfe). Find an open one and capture its unique architecture or atmosphere.
This area is famous for art galleries. Take a photo of a compelling piece of art through a gallery window.
Find a 'Stolperstein' (stumbling stone), a small brass plaque in the pavement commemorating a victim of the Holocaust, and photograph it.
Capture an interesting detail from a designer boutique's window display.
Take a black and white photo that captures the historic and chic vibe of the Scheunenviertel.
Photograph a modern reflection in the window of an old, historic building.
Take a selfie enjoying a coffee or pastry at one of the neighborhood's stylish cafes.
Capture a photo that represents the unique and fashionable street style of Mitte.
Find and photograph a spot where historic architecture stands right next to a modern building.
Find a surprising patch of green, like a plant-covered balcony or a hidden garden, in the urban landscape.
Photograph an ornate or interesting doorway on one of the historic buildings.
As evening approaches, capture the warm glow of a restaurant or bar.
Find a uniquely stylish bicycle and take a photo of it against a classic Mitte backdrop.
Take a picture of a street sign with a historically significant name, like Oranienburger Straße.
Look down! Capture an interesting pattern in the cobblestones or pavement.
Auguststraße is an art hub. Capture a photo that represents the artistic soul of this street, whether it's a gallery, a sculpture, or street art.
Find a cafe with inviting outdoor seating and photograph the scene.
Take a photo looking up at the facade of one of the beautifully restored buildings in the area.
Take a selfie reflected in the window of a stylish boutique on or around Auguststraße.
Capture the warm, inviting light from a bar or restaurant as dusk settles.
Find a quiet side street off the main drag and capture a moment of tranquility.
Photograph a delicious-looking meal or snack you're about to enjoy in the neighborhood.
Capture an interesting play of light and shadow on a building's facade or on the cobblestone streets.
Find and photograph a plaque or sign that hints at the history of a building.
Find a flower box, ivy-covered wall, or tree that adds a splash of nature to the urban scene.
Take a selfie looking thoughtful in front of an art gallery.
Get low and take a photo down a street, emphasizing the lines of the buildings and the cobblestones.
Find a pop of unexpected color in the neighborhood and make it the focus of your photo.
Capture a candid moment of daily life in the neighborhood.
Find and photograph some interesting or old-fashioned typography on a shop sign or building.
Kreuzberg is a canvas for street art. Find a large-scale mural and capture its vibrant energy.
Take a photo along the Landwehr Canal that captures the relaxed, waterside vibe of the neighborhood.
Zoom in on the texture of Kreuzberg. Photograph a sticker-bombed lamp post, a worn-out doorway, or some detailed graffiti.
Kreuzberg is famous for its Turkish food. Take an artistic photo of a döner kebab or another Turkish delight.
Take a selfie on one of Kreuzberg's many bridges with the canal or a bustling street in the background.
Capture a scene that you feel represents the alternative, counter-culture spirit of Kreuzberg.
Find a local market or a bustling fruit and vegetable stand and capture the colors and activity.
Take a dynamic photo of the iconic yellow U-Bahn train, especially the elevated U1 line.
Take a photo of a classic Berlin 'Späti' (late-night convenience store), a social hub in the neighborhood.
Discover a leafy courtyard, a community garden, or a park and capture this green escape from the urban hustle.
Kreuzberg is full of bikes. Find one that has character—maybe it's old, colorful, or covered in plants—and photograph it.
Photograph a spot where a grand 'Altbau' (old building) stands next to modern or post-war architecture.
If you spot a street musician or performer, capture their performance and the atmosphere around them.
As night falls, take a photo of the neon signs and glowing lights of a bar or restaurant.
Find an object or a wall with a bold, striking color and make it the subject of your photo.
Find a bar with a cool, inviting exterior and capture its unique vibe.
Take a selfie relaxing by the canal on Maybachufer or Pannierstraße.
Photograph a dish or a storefront that represents the diverse, international food scene of Neukölln.
Capture an interesting item or a cool display in one of Neukölln's many second-hand or vintage shops.
Create a still life photo of your specialty coffee or craft beer against a classic Neukölln backdrop.
Find a small, hidden piece of street art—a paste-up, a small stencil, or a tag—and make it your subject.
Take a photo that shows the contrast between old, gritty buildings and new, trendy cafes or shops.
Walk down Weserstraße and take a photo that captures the essence of this famous, bar-lined street.
Capture a scene of people relaxing and socializing outside a Späti or on a street corner.
Peek into the doorways of apartment buildings to find and photograph a hidden, quiet courtyard (Hinterhof).
Find a surprisingly beautiful flower box, balcony garden, or tree in bloom and capture it.
Find a spot with a clear view (like a bridge or near Tempelhofer Feld) and capture the colors of the sunset over Neukölln.
Photograph an interesting font on an old shop sign or a modern bar.
Capture the reflection of a street scene in a puddle, a shop window, or a pair of sunglasses.
Take a photo that captures a genuine, unposed moment of life on the streets of Neukölln.
Find a particularly beautiful 'Altbau' (pre-war building) with ornate details and capture its elegant facade.
Take a low-angle shot of a cobblestone street, emphasizing the texture and historic feel of the neighborhood.
Take a selfie enjoying a coffee and cake at one of the many charming cafes in the area.
Visit a 'Platz' like Kollwitzplatz or Helmholtzplatz and capture a scene of local life: a playground, a market, or people relaxing.
Photograph an inviting or creatively designed storefront of a local boutique.
The neighborhood is famous for its many young families. Capture a photo that humorously or artfully includes a baby stroller.
Find an organic food store ('Biomarkt') or a healthy cafe and photograph a colorful display of fresh produce or food.
Look up! Find a balcony overflowing with plants and flowers and make it the subject of your photo.
Treat yourself to a scoop from a local ice cream parlor and take a delicious-looking photo of it.
Wander off the main roads like Schönhauser Allee and capture the quiet, residential charm of a side street.
Find a creative angle to photograph the iconic Water Tower (Wasserturm), a neighborhood landmark.
Photograph an ornate and beautifully carved wooden door, typical of the buildings here.
Capture the warm light of the late afternoon hitting the facades of the beautiful apartment buildings.
Find one of the many creative playgrounds and take a photo of its unique design.
Take a photo of a yellow tram making its way through the picturesque streets.
Capture the facade of a grand, well-preserved Altbau building that represents the classic Schöneberg style.
If it's a market day at Winterfeldtplatz, photograph a colorful stall of produce, flowers, or food.
Find a cafe with inviting outdoor seating and capture a moment of neighborhood calm.
Schöneberg has a rich LGBTQ+ history. Find and photograph a rainbow flag or other symbol of pride in the neighborhood.
Take a selfie in the reflection of one of the charming boutique windows on Akazienstraße or Belziger Straße.
Look for old, painted signs on buildings or classic typography on shopfronts and take a photo.
Find a local bookshop and photograph its inviting exterior or a display of books.
Capture a beautifully maintained front garden, an ivy-covered wall, or a lush tree-lined street.
As evening sets in, capture the warm, welcoming glow from a local bar or restaurant.
Find and photograph an example of decorative ironwork on a balcony or gate.
Capture a photo that shows the relaxed, residential pace of life in the Akazienkiez.
Photograph a delicious pastry or cake from one of the neighborhood's traditional 'Konditorei' (pastry shops).
Stand on a street corner and take a photo that captures the convergence of two charming streets.
Photograph one of the classic, historic U-Bahn station entrances in the area, like the one at Nollendorfplatz.
Capture an interesting pattern of shadows cast by trees or buildings on a sunny afternoon.
Find the most vibrant piece of street art you can and strike a pose that matches its energy.
Capture a photo that you think perfectly sums up the alternative, punk-rock vibe of Friedrichshain.
Find a lamppost or sign covered in band stickers and take a selfie with your favorite one.
Photograph the contrast between an old East German 'Plattenbau' building and modern street art or architecture.
Grab a classic Berlin snack or drink from a 'Späti' (convenience store) and take an artistic shot of it.
Peek behind the main streets to find a quiet 'Hinterhof' (courtyard) and capture its hidden charm.
Find a bicycle that has been creatively decorated, reclaimed by nature, or uniquely parked.
Snap a photo of the most unusual or retro item you can spot in a vintage shop window.
Take a picture of a sign, poster, or piece of graffiti with a really interesting or unusual font.
Take a selfie in the reflection of a shop window, puddle, or sunglasses.
Look down! Find an interesting pattern on the pavement, a manhole cover, or cobblestones and take a photo.
Find a piece of art or a decoration made from recycled or upcycled materials.
Capture a moment of quiet or community in one of the neighborhood's green spaces.
Find a plant or flower growing in an unexpected urban place, like a crack in the wall or on a balcony.
As evening approaches, capture the glow of a bar, restaurant, or street lamp.
Take a photo that captures the multicultural, rebellious, and vibrant spirit of Kreuzberg in a single frame.
Find a spot along the Landwehr Canal and capture a beautiful or interesting reflection in the water.
Get some of Kreuzberg's famous street food and take a delicious-looking selfie before you take a bite.
Find a piece of political graffiti, a sticker, or a poster that makes a statement and photograph it.
Stand on one of Kreuzberg's many bridges and take a photo of the view down the canal or street.
Look for an old, ornate doorway on a residential building and capture its intricate details.
Capture the lively, chaotic energy of a street market or a bustling square.
Find a building with a vertical garden, an overgrown balcony, or a tree bursting through the concrete.
Photograph the exterior of a classic, old-school German pub ('Kneipe') that looks like it has a million stories.
Discreetly capture a candid moment of daily life: people chatting, a dog waiting for its owner, a street musician playing.
Find the most unusual or creatively designed storefront and snap a picture.
Find an interesting shadow cast by a building, a person, or a bicycle and take a creative photo.
Try to get a bicycle, a car, and a form of public transport (like a bus or U-Bahn sign) all in one shot.
Look up! Take a picture of the sky as it's framed by the surrounding apartment buildings.
Discover a small community garden or a hidden green space and capture its essence.
Find a hidden 'Hof' (courtyard) and capture its quiet, secret beauty away from the bustling streets.
Take a photo that shows a historic building next to or reflected in a modern piece of architecture.
Take a selfie in front of an art gallery that has an intriguing name or a captivating piece visible from the outside.
Find a cobblestone street and take a low-angle shot that emphasizes the texture and history under your feet.
Photograph the most elegant or creative window display you can find at one of Mitte's boutiques.
Zoom in on an architectural detail of a pre-war building: a sculpture, a balcony railing, or a window frame.
Find a 'Stolperstein' (a small, brass memorial plaque in the pavement) and take a respectful photo that captures its purpose.
Capture a photo of a street musician or artist performing, showing their interaction with the historic surroundings.
Take a photo that captures the sophisticated and cozy atmosphere of a classic Mitte cafe.
Take a selfie with a famous landmark (like the TV Tower or a museum) visible, but from a unique, artistic angle.
Find a wall that shows layers of history—peeling paint, old brick, modern graffiti—and photograph the texture.
Find a public sculpture and take a creative photo where you appear to be interacting with it.
Take a photo of the Spree river, making sure to include the unique architecture along its banks.
Find a uniquely designed bench, street lamp, or bike rack and make it the subject of your photo.
Capture the warm, golden hour light hitting the facade of one of Mitte's beautiful old buildings.
Take a selfie that you think perfectly captures the effortlessly cool, trendy-but-gritty vibe of Neukölln.
Find a bar or cafe and take an artistic photo of a colorful cocktail, a craft beer, or a coffee with latte art.
Find a street with a name that's tricky to pronounce (like Pannierstraße or Weserstraße) and take a picture of the sign.
Spot a 'Zu Verschenken' (to give away for free) box on the street and photograph the most interesting item inside.
As dusk falls, find a quirky neon sign from a bar or shop and capture its glow.
Photograph a shop window or restaurant sign that showcases the neighborhood's international diversity.
Take a photo of a group of people enjoying a drink or conversation on the sidewalk outside a bar.
Grab a döner kebab and strike a dramatic pose with it before you eat.
Find a building facade that is worn and weathered but still beautiful and capture its texture and character.
Take a photo down a quiet residential street, trying to get a hint of a bustling main road in the distance.
Find a community notice board and photograph the most interesting, artistic, or funny flyer you see.
Find an unexpected patch of green: a particularly lush balcony, a community garden, or a tree in full bloom.
Sit at an outdoor cafe and take a photo that captures the diverse and stylish crowd of Neukölln.
Find a spot with a clear view (like a bridge or wide street) and capture the sunset over the rooftops.
Take a photo that represents the beginning of a night out in Neukölln – maybe a bar's entrance or a group of friends heading out.
Find a beautifully restored 'Altbau' (old building) and take a photo that highlights its elegant facade and details.
Capture a vibrant scene at a weekend market – focus on the fresh produce, the people, or the handmade crafts.
Find the most picturesque cobblestone street lined with trees and old buildings and snap a photo.
Get a delicious-looking pastry from a local bakery and take a selfie with it before you indulge.
Take a photo that sums up the charming 'Kiez' (neighborhood) life: outdoor cafe seating, boutiques, and people strolling.
Photograph the storefront of an organic food shop ('Bioladen') or a store selling handmade goods.
Look up and find a balcony that is overflowing with plants and flowers, and capture its beauty.
Find an angle where you can see the iconic TV Tower peeking out between the neighborhood's historic buildings.
Find one of the neighborhood's creative playgrounds and take a picture of its most imaginative feature.
Capture the cozy, inviting atmosphere of a local bookshop from the outside.
Photograph an elaborate entryway or a beautiful interior staircase that is visible from the street.
Take a photo of a yellow tram as it moves through the picturesque streets of the neighborhood.
Find a quiet, leafy green courtyard and capture the sense of peace it offers.
Capture a photo that represents the family-friendly vibe of the area - maybe a stylish stroller or a family enjoying an ice cream.
Find a view of the famous 'Wasserturm' (water tower) and take a photo of this local landmark.
Find a rainbow flag or symbol and take a photo that celebrates Schöneberg's history as an LGBTQ+ hub.
Capture the vibrant atmosphere of the Winterfeldtplatz market. Focus on the colorful stalls, the food, or the crowd.
Photograph the facade of a grand 'Altbau' on a residential street, focusing on its stately charm.
Find a cozy, traditional-looking cafe and take a selfie enjoying a coffee or just the atmosphere.
Find an antique shop or a quirky boutique and photograph its most interesting window display.
Discover a quiet, green square away from the main streets and capture its peaceful vibe.
Look for a historic plaque on a building (like where Bowie lived) and take a photo of it.
Photograph the exterior of a classic German pub ('Kneipe') that looks like it's been there for generations.
Find a unique or beautifully carved wooden doorway and make it the subject of your photo.
Look up and photograph the details of a beautiful wrought-iron balcony.
Find a street corner that looks like it could be a set from a classic film and capture the scene.
Capture the warm glow of the old-fashioned streetlights on the residential streets as evening sets in.
Find a well-tended front garden or a collection of potted plants outside a building and photograph it.
Find a sign for a local business that looks like it has been serving the community for decades.
Find a piece of public art or a sculpture and take a selfie with it.
